children.heading: Administrator
children.label: 1 Administrator
children.text: The term “Administrator” means the Administrator of the National Aeronautics and Space Administration.

children.label: A
children.text: the Committee on Commerce, Science, and Transportation of the Senate; and

children.label: B
children.text: the Committee on Science of the House of Representatives.1So in original. Probably should be followed by “and Technology”.1

children.heading: Cis-lunar space
children.label: 3 Cis-lunar space
children.text: The term “cis-lunar space” means the region of space from the Earth out to and including the region around the surface of the Moon.

children.heading: Deep space
children.label: 4 Deep space
children.text: The term “deep space” means the region of space beyond cis-lunar space.

children.heading: ISS
children.label: 5 ISS
children.text: The term “ISS” means the International Space Station.

children.heading: NASA
children.label: 6 NASA
children.text: The term “NASA” means the National Aeronautics and Space Administration.

children.heading: Near-Earth space
children.label: 7 Near-Earth space
children.text: The term “near-Earth space” means the region of space that includes low-Earth orbit and extends out to and includes geo-synchronous orbit.

children.heading: NOAA
children.label: 8 NOAA
children.text: The term “NOAA” means the National Oceanic and Atmospheric Administration.

children.heading: OSTP
children.label: 9 OSTP
children.text: The term “OSTP” means the Office of Science and Technology Policy.

children.heading: Space Launch System
children.label: 10 Space Launch System
children.text: The term “Space Launch System” means the follow-on government-owned civil launch system developed, managed, and operated by NASA to serve as a key component to expand human presence beyond low-Earth orbit.
